cases.objective: Authenticated web, BFF and API testing
Injection, SSRF, unsafe parsing, import and stored-content testing
Cross-tenant read denial across direct and nested objects
Cross-tenant create, update, delete, import and export denial
Horizontal and vertical privilege escalation denial
Revoked, stale and conflicting role/capability behavior
Identity, session, cookie, CORS, CSRF, headers and TLS configuration
Secrets in repository history, artifacts, logs, images and client bundles
Production IAM, least privilege, break-glass and audit configuration
Backend, frontend and container vulnerability review
Lockfiles, provenance, build actions and deployment-chain integrity
Personal-data inventory, purpose, minimization, retention and deletion
Workflow approval, state-transition and direct-API bypass testing
Financial idempotency, replay, concurrency and reconciliation testing
Audit completeness, authorization, correlation and tamper resistance
Independent retest of every critical/high finding
Regression retest of security invariants on final candidate release
